data.title: Arthur Hayes Forecasts Bitcoin Boom Amid US Tariff Policies
data.description: Arthur Hayes, co-founder of BitMEX, has projected a significant increase in the value of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC). This anticipated surge is linked to the tariff policies of President Donald Trump.

data.title: Robinhood Co-Founder Baiju Bhatt Launches $50M Space Solar Bet To Beam Energy From Orbit, Eyes 2026 Demo In Sci-Fi Comeback
As Trump Intensifies Tariff War With China, Global Economy Feels the Tremors: 'What's the Endgame Here?'
data.description: President Trump's escalation of his tariff war with China has significantly disturbed the global economy.

data.title: Consumer Tech News (April 7-April 11): US President Puts 90-Days Pause On Tariffs, Microsoft May Cut Jobs & More
data.description: Trump's 90-day tariff pause boosts markets, while Michigan auto groups criticize him for not halting auto tariffs.

data.title: Warren Buffett's Wealth Grows Even Amid Tariff War and Global Market Turmoil
data.description: In the midst of the global market sell-off triggered by President Trump's tariffs, Warren Buffett has seen a significant increase in his net worth.
